title: tristemon repens
intro: Tristemon repens, also known as creeping tristemon, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Tristemon repens include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Tristemon repens can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cultures, it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice to aid in wound healing and to reduce pain and inflammation.
